title: degenia velebitica
intro: Degenia velebitica is a rare, biennial plant species of the mustard family, native to the Balkans, particularly in Croatia's Velebit Mountains. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as alleviating respiratory issues, reducing pain and swelling, and possibly aiding in digestion. Traditionally, Degenia velebitica is prepared as a decoction or infusion, and its herbal preparations are often used in folk medicine to treat various ailments, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
